Interface IChecklistPageListener

All Superinterfaces:
ICollectionPageListener, IDataPanelListener<Task>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ChecklistPageController
public interface IChecklistPageListener extends ICollectionPageListener, IDataPanelListener<Task>
Defines a listener interface for handling user interactions on a checklist page.

This interface extends ICollectionPageListener to support actions on a checklist's title and its items, and IDataPanelListener to support edit, delete, and selection of individual Tasks.

Implementing classes respond to user input in the checklist page's UI, including list-level and task-level operations as well as view changes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onBackButtonPressed()
    Called when the user presses a "back" button on the checklist page, indicating that they want to navigate back to the workspace page.
    void
    onDeleteListRequested(Checklist listToDelete)
    Called when the user requests to delete the entire checklist.
    void
    onDisplayModeToggled()
    Called when the user toggles the checklist's display mode (e.g. showing all tasks vs. only incomplete tasks).
    void
    onSortModeChosen(TaskSorter.Mode sortMode)
    Called when the user chooses a new sort mode for the checklist's tasks.

    Methods inherited from interface ICollectionPageListener

    onAddNewItemRequested, onClearRequested, onRenameTitleRequested

    Methods inherited from interface IDataPanelListener

    onDeleteItemRequested, onEditItemRequested, onItemSelected

  • Method Details

    • onDeleteListRequested

      void onDeleteListRequested(Checklist listToDelete)
      Called when the user requests to delete the entire checklist. Implementing classes should prompt for confirmation and remove the list from its containing Workspace.
      Parameters:
      listToDelete - the Checklist that the user intends to delete

    • onSortModeChosen

      void onSortModeChosen(TaskSorter.Mode sortMode)
      Called when the user chooses a new sort mode for the checklist's tasks. Implementing classes should apply the specified TaskSorter.Mode to reorder the displayed tasks.
      Parameters:
      sortMode - the sort mode selected by the user

    • onDisplayModeToggled

      void onDisplayModeToggled()
      Called when the user toggles the checklist's display mode (e.g. showing all tasks vs. only incomplete tasks). Implementing classes should switch between the display modes.

    • onBackButtonPressed

      void onBackButtonPressed()
      Called when the user presses a "back" button on the checklist page, indicating that they want to navigate back to the workspace page.
